item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\")); const rows=Array.isArray(data)?data:(data.records||data.orders||data.sales||[]); const by=new Map(); for (const r of rows){ const region=String(r.region??r.Region??r.REGION); const sku=String(r.sku??r.SKU); const qty=Number(r.quantity??r.qty??r.QTY); const rev=Number(r.revenue_cents??r.revenueCents??r.revenue??r.REVENUE); if("'!by.has(region)) by.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()}); const g=by.get(region); g.qty+=qty; g.rev+=rev; g.skuRev.set(sku,(g.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+rev); } const answer=[...by.entries()].sort(([a],[b])=>a.localeCompare(b)).map(([region,g])=>{ let top=null, topRev=-Infinity; for(const [sku,rev] of g.skuRev){ if(rev>topRev || (rev===topRev && sku<top)){ top=sku; topRev=rev; } } return `${region}|${g.qty}|${g.rev}|${top}`; }); console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer},null,2));'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\")); const rows=Array.isArray(data)?data:(data.records||data.orders||data.sales||[]); const by=new Map(); for (const r of rows){ const region=String(r.region??r.Region??r.REGION); const sku=String(r.sku??r.SKU); const qty=Number(r.quantity??r.qty??r.QTY); const rev=Number(r.revenue_cents??r.revenueCents??r.revenue??r.REVENUE); if("'!by.has(region)) by.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()}); const g=by.get(region); g.qty+=qty; g.rev+=rev; g.skuRev.set(sku,(g.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+rev); } const answer=[...by.entries()].sort(([a],[b])=>a.localeCompare(b)).map(([region,g])=>{ let top=null, topRev=-Infinity; for(const [sku,rev] of g.skuRev){ if(rev>topRev || (rev===topRev && sku<top)){ top=sku; topRev=rev; } } return `${region}|${g.qty}|${g.rev}|${top}`; }); console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer},null,2));'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\")); const rows=Array.isArray(data)?data:Object.values(data).find(Array.isArray)||[]; const by=new Map(); for (const r of rows){ const region=String(r.region); const sku=String(r.sku); const qty=Number(r.quantity); let rev; if (r.revenue_cents"'!=null) rev=Number(r.revenue_cents); else if (r.revenueCents!=null) rev=Number(r.revenueCents); else if (r.total_cents!=null) rev=Number(r.total_cents); else if (r.totalRevenueCents!=null) rev=Number(r.totalRevenueCents); else if (r.unit_price_cents!=null) rev=qty*Number(r.unit_price_cents); else if (r.price_cents!=null) rev=qty*Number(r.price_cents); else if (r.unitPriceCents!=null) rev=qty*Number(r.unitPriceCents); else if (r.priceCents!=null) rev=qty*Number(r.priceCents); else throw new Error("no revenue field: "+JSON.stringify(r)); if(!by.has(region)) by.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()}); const g=by.get(region); g.qty+=qty; g.rev+=rev; g.skuRev.set(sku,(g.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+rev); } const answer=[...by.entries()].sort(([a],[b])=>a.localeCompare(b)).map(([region,g])=>{ let top="", topRev=-1; for(const [sku,rev] of g.skuRev){ if(rev>topRev || (rev===topRev && sku<top)){ top=sku; topRev=rev; } } return `${region}|${g.qty}|${g.rev}|${top}`; }); console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer},null,2));'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\")); const rows=Array.isArray(data)?data:Object.values(data).find(Array.isArray)||[]; const by=new Map(); for (const r of rows){ const region=String(r.region); const sku=String(r.sku); const qty=Number(r.quantity); let rev; if (r.revenue_cents"'!=null) rev=Number(r.revenue_cents); else if (r.revenueCents!=null) rev=Number(r.revenueCents); else if (r.total_cents!=null) rev=Number(r.total_cents); else if (r.totalRevenueCents!=null) rev=Number(r.totalRevenueCents); else if (r.unit_price_cents!=null) rev=qty*Number(r.unit_price_cents); else if (r.price_cents!=null) rev=qty*Number(r.price_cents); else if (r.unitPriceCents!=null) rev=qty*Number(r.unitPriceCents); else if (r.priceCents!=null) rev=qty*Number(r.priceCents); else throw new Error("no revenue field: "+JSON.stringify(r)); if(!by.has(region)) by.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()}); const g=by.get(region); g.qty+=qty; g.rev+=rev; g.skuRev.set(sku,(g.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+rev); } const answer=[...by.entries()].sort(([a],[b])=>a.localeCompare(b)).map(([region,g])=>{ let top="", topRev=-1; for(const [sku,rev] of g.skuRev){ if(rev>topRev || (rev===topRev && sku<top)){ top=sku; topRev=rev; } } return `${region}|${g.qty}|${g.rev}|${top}`; }); console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer},null,2));'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e 'const fs=require(\"fs\"); const rows=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(\"input.json\",\"utf8\")); const by=new Map(); for (const r of rows){ const region=r.region, sku=r.sku, qty=Number(r.qty), rev=qty*Number(r.price_cents); if("'!by.has(region)) by.set(region,{qty:0,rev:0,skuRev:new Map()}); const g=by.get(region); g.qty+=qty; g.rev+=rev; g.skuRev.set(sku,(g.skuRev.get(sku)||0)+rev); } const answer=[...by.entries()].sort(([a],[b])=>a.localeCompare(b)).map(([region,g])=>{ let top="", topRev=-1; for(const [sku,rev] of g.skuRev){ if(rev>topRev || (rev===topRev && sku<top)){ top=sku; topRev=rev; } } return `${region}|${g.qty}|${g.rev}|${top}`; }); console.log(JSON.stringify({task_id:"aggregate-v1",answer},null,2));'"'"
